name: Counterspell
castingTimeTrigger: when you see a creature within 60 feet casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components
description: You attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell. It makes a Constitution saving throw; on a failure the spell dissipates with no effect and its action/slot is wasted. Engine: there is no enemy-spellcasting pipeline to interrupt yet (US-117), so this is descriptive — castable for flavour during exploration.
